subcodes.first_line: By the life of God! Such injustice hath been perpetrated against this Revelation as hath neither peer nor likeness, nor have the chosen ones of that land witnessed its like before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر الله ظلمی بر این ظهور وارد شده که شبه و مثل نداشته و ندارد اولیای ان ارض را از قبل
